What We Do

Complete multimodal
logistics solutions

All services

Sea Cargo & Ocean Freight

FCL and LCL (groupage) shipments on all major trade routes. Port-to-port and door-to-door, including dangerous goods and car dealership cargo.

Learn more

Air Freight

Expedited global shipping for time-sensitive and high-value cargo, utilizing a network of major international air hubs with full visibility.

Learn more

Road & Land Transport

Heavy-duty trucking and trailer transport across East Africa including dangerous goods storage, last-mile delivery, and cross-border road freight.

Learn more

Warehousing & Distribution

Secure storage in Kigali, Guangzhou (佛山), and Yiwu warehouses with inventory management, dangerous goods facilities, and cross-docking.

Learn more

Customs Clearance & Declaration

Full customs clearance, maritime declaration, dangerous goods declaration, duty management, and all border documentation — handled by licensed experts.

Learn more

China Business Connection

We connect you with verified suppliers, handle factory visits, money transfers to suppliers, invitation letters, hotel bookings, and full sourcing support from Guangzhou & Yiwu.

Learn more

Insights & News

Galilea Insights & Updates

All insights
East Africa Focus

Galilea expands warehousing capacity in Guangzhou & Yiwu to serve growing China–Africa trade demand

February 3, 2025

Our Foshan (佛山) and Yiwu warehouses now offer expanded dangerous goods storage, groupage consolidation, and direct China-to-Kigali routing for faster deliveries.

Air Freight

New direct air cargo routes: Kigali (RWA) to Guangzhou (CAN) now available

January 24, 2025

Fast & reliable air freight service connecting Rwanda directly to China, ideal for time-sensitive and high-value shipments.

Technology

Galilea launches financial support & money transfer service for importers

January 15, 2025

Send money directly to your suppliers in China and beyond — fast, secure, and fully integrated with your shipment booking process.

The Galilea Difference

Why businesses trust us with their supply chains

From Kigali to Guangzhou, Yiwu to your door — we handle sea, air, land, customs, sourcing, and financial support so your business keeps moving.

"Your Trusted Logistics Partner Worldwide — Connecting the World, Delivering Excellence."

— Galilea Global Logistics
Global Network
Access to every major trade hub via sea, air, and land — 130+ countries, 48+ port partners.
Full Transparency
Real-time tracking and clear communication at every milestone, with zero surprises.
Full-Service Logistics
Sea, air, land, customs, warehousing, supplier sourcing, money transfers, and financial support — one partner, every step.
China–Africa Corridor
Offices in Kigali, Guangzhou & Yiwu — direct access to Chinese factories, warehouses and suppliers.
